title: Love Song
content:
Your eyes are bright lands.
    Your looks are little birds,
    Handkerchiefs gently waving goodbye.
    In your smile I rest as though in bobbing boats.
    Your little stories are made of silk.
    I must behold you always.
meaning:
Alfred Lichtenstein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Love Song"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
